text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Wakagoma Stakes has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the race, Tokai Teio enters Nice
Nature's waiting room by mistake and
preemptively declares victory with great
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature, who has hardly even been
acknowledged by Tokai Teio, is determined to
give her a challenge as she heads to the
racecourse.
